TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tjusepayuan sikay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjusepayuan. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjusepayuan sa, 148 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 504 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 498 ku tademaw, pakalatu 99%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 1%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 83%, Rukai 10%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 5%.
S.PHON: tjusəpajuan sikaj nu nijazuʔ~ʡ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjusəpajuan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjusəpajuan sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai **%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjusepayuan sikay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjusepayuan. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjusepayuan sa, 148 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 504 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 498 ku tademaw, pakalatu 99%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 6 ku tademaw, pakalatu 1%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 83%, Rukai 10%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 5%.
S.PHON: tjusəpajuan sikaj nu nijazuʔ~ʡ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjusəpajuan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjusəpajuan sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai **%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
